isEmail: {property} must be a valid email address
minLength: {property} must be at least {constraints.0} characters long
maxLength: {property} must be at most {constraints.0} characters long
isEnum: {property} must be a valid enum value
isPhoneNumber: {property} must be a valid phone number
isDateString: {property} must be a valid date string
isPassword: {property} must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number and one special character
length: {property} must be between {constraints.1} and {constraints.0} characters long
